mission.title: envoy: Support for HTTP/1.0
mission.description: Support for HTTP/1.0. Requested by 18+ users.

steps.title: Check current envoy deployment
steps.description:
Verify your envoy version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n envoy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=envoy
helm list -n envoy 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working envoy installation.

steps.title: Review envoy configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant envoy configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n envoy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=envoy
kubectl get configmap -n envoy -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=envoy
```
Envoy responds to an HTTP/1.0 request with an upgrade request

```
GET / HTTP/1.0

HTTP/1.1 426 Upgrade Required
server: envoy
date: Mon, 24 Oct 2016 2159 GMT
x-envoy-protocol-version: HTTP/1.1
content-length: 0

```

It would be nice to support 1.0

steps.title: Apply the fix for Support for HTTP/1.0
steps.description:
Allowing incoming HTTP/1.0 (if configured)

*handles HTTP/1.0 connection close logic (close unless Connection: keep-alive)
*dechunks responses
*allows for empty host (given configured default host)

*Risk Level*: Medium (config guarded but still messing with connection manager internals)
*Testing*:
```yaml
GET / HTTP/1.0

HTTP/1.1 426 Upgrade Required
server: envoy
date: Mon, 24 Oct 2016 21:11:59 GMT
x-envoy-protocol-version: HTTP/1.1
content-length: 0
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n envoy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=envoy
kubectl get events -n envoy --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Support for HTTP/1.0" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
Allowing incoming HTTP/1.0 (if configured)

*handles HTTP/1.0 connection close logic (close unless Connection: keep-alive)
*dechunks responses
*allows for empty host (given configured default host)

*Risk Level*: Medium (config guarded but still messing with connection manager internals)
*Testing*:  Added new integration tests of HTTP/1.0 and the listed features.
codeSnippets:
GET / HTTP/1.0

HTTP/1.1 426 Upgrade Required
server: envoy
date: Mon, 24 Oct 2016 21:11:59 GMT
x-envoy-protocol-version: HTTP/1.1
content-length: 0

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with envoy installed or the issue environment reproducible.
